mapper.sql: SELECT c.id, c.user_id, c.menu_item_id, c.quantity, c.created_at, m.name, m.price, m.image, m.category FROM cart_item c JOIN menu_item m ON m.id = c.menu_item_id
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM cart_item WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND menu_item_id = #{menuItemId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart_item (user_id, menu_item_id, quantity) VALUES (#{userId}, #{menuItemId}, #{quantity})
mapper.update: UPDATE cart_item SET quantity = #{quantity} WHERE id = #{id}
